creator: peter@flytrace.com
text:
pytorch installed from package on FreeBSD 14.0-RELEASE-p6 in Oracle cloud on Ampere CPU (aarch64).

Trying to build an example from golang (github.com/nullbull/gotch) that uses C++ bindings of libtorch, I get the following linker error:

/usr/local/go121/pkg/tool/freebsd_arm64/link: running clang++ failed: exit status 1
/usr/local/bin/ld.bfd: /usr/local/lib/libtorch_cpu.so: undefined reference to `cpuinfo_isa'
clang++: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)

Trying to explore libtorch_cpu.so, I get:

# nm -D /usr/local/lib/libtorch_cpu.so | grep cpuinfo
U cpuinfo_get_processors_count
U cpuinfo_get_uarch
U cpuinfo_get_uarchs_count
U cpuinfo_initialize
U cpuinfo_isa

So the symbols are really missing from the shared lib.

On another server with amd64 CPU I get:

# nm -D /usr/local/lib/libtorch_cpu.so | grep cpuinfo
00000000083991a0 T cpuinfo_deinitialize
0000000008398b50 T cpuinfo_get_cluster
0000000008398a40 T cpuinfo_get_clusters
0000000008398c60 T cpuinfo_get_clusters_count
0000000008398b10 T cpuinfo_get_core
0000000008398a10 T cpuinfo_get_cores
0000000008398c30 T cpuinfo_get_cores_count
0000000008399060 T cpuinfo_get_current_core
0000000008399040 T cpuinfo_get_current_processor
0000000008399080 T cpuinfo_get_current_uarch_index
00000000083990a0 T cpuinfo_get_current_uarch_index_with_default
0000000008398e20 T cpuinfo_get_l1d_cache
0000000008398d20 T cpuinfo_get_l1d_caches
0000000008398f50 T cpuinfo_get_l1d_caches_count
0000000008398de0 T cpuinfo_get_l1i_cache
0000000008398cf0 T cpuinfo_get_l1i_caches
0000000008398f20 T cpuinfo_get_l1i_caches_count
0000000008398e60 T cpuinfo_get_l2_cache
0000000008398d50 T cpuinfo_get_l2_caches
0000000008398f80 T cpuinfo_get_l2_caches_count
0000000008398ea0 T cpuinfo_get_l3_cache
0000000008398d80 T cpuinfo_get_l3_caches
0000000008398fb0 T cpuinfo_get_l3_caches_count
0000000008398ee0 T cpuinfo_get_l4_cache
0000000008398db0 T cpuinfo_get_l4_caches
0000000008398fe0 T cpuinfo_get_l4_caches_count
0000000008399010 T cpuinfo_get_max_cache_size
0000000008398b90 T cpuinfo_get_package
0000000008398a70 T cpuinfo_get_packages
0000000008398c90 T cpuinfo_get_packages_count
0000000008398ad0 T cpuinfo_get_processor
0000000008398950 T cpuinfo_get_processors
0000000008398c00 T cpuinfo_get_processors_count
0000000008398bd0 T cpuinfo_get_uarch
0000000008398aa0 T cpuinfo_get_uarchs
0000000008398cc0 T cpuinfo_get_uarchs_count
00000000083990c0 T cpuinfo_initialize
000000000b2f9c38 B cpuinfo_isa
00000000083991b0 T cpuinfo_vlog_error
0000000008399300 T cpuinfo_vlog_fatal
